/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/first_and_follow.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/first_and_follow.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/first_and_follow.dir/src/grammar.c.o CMakeFiles/first_and_follow.dir/src/analyzer.c.o CMakeFiles/first_and_follow.dir/src/automaton.c.o CMakeFiles/first_and_follow.dir/src/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/first_and_follow.dir/scanner.c.o -o first_and_follow
